name: paper-verify
description: Citation verification and source triage for Markdown/text documents.

interface.shortDescription: Verify citations and shortlist risky sources.
interface.longDescription: Paper Verify adds a citation verification workflow for research papers, reports, lecture notes, and blog posts. It can call the paper-verify CLI/MCP surface, parse structured JSON, and reduce a long source list to the citations that need human review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Verify this document's citations and produce a shortlist of sources that need human review.
